coat_colors: fallow to reddish brown with white

description.overview: A unique breed with six toes on each foot and extreme flexibility, bred to hunt puffins on Norwegian cliffs. They're rare, primitive dogs with special needs.
description.history: The Norwegian Lundehund originated in Norway.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, energetic, loyal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A unique breed with six toes on each foot and extreme flexibility, bred to hunt puffins on Norwegian cliffs. They're rare, primitive dogs with special needs.
